title: It's a Doll's World
overview: Rudy gets a second chance at life, when he inherits his family's doll-making business, but it comes with a challenging stipulation. Rudy's Uncle Jack seems to have his nephew's best interests at heart, until he teams up with a greedy business partner and helps develop a sordid plan to become rich.
